employers.name: InnovateCorp
employers.notes: Matches full-time employee gifts to accredited universities at a 2:1 rate. Annual cap applies per employee.

employers.name: Global Tech Solutions
employers.notes: Eligible for full-time and part-time employees. Retirees not eligible.

employers.name: Heritage Financial Group
employers.notes: Matches gifts to scholarship and student support funds only.

employers.name: Metro Health Systems
employers.notes: Employees must submit a matching request form through the company intranet.

student_stories.title: Designing Affordable Solar Housing
student_stories.summary: Ariana, a mechanical engineering major, led a student team that prototyped low-cost solar panels for off-campus housing, helping reduce utility costs for low-income students.

student_stories.title: First-Generation Engineer Building Community
student_stories.summary: As a first-generation college student, Marcus found support in an engineering mentorship program funded by donors, helping him secure an internship in sustainable infrastructure.

student_stories.title: From Classroom Lab to Clean Water Solutions
student_stories.summary: Priya used a donor-funded undergraduate research grant to test low-cost filtration systems, bringing clean water prototypes to a rural partner community.

student_stories.title: Robotics Club Inspires Future Innovators
student_stories.summary: Ethan credits upgraded robotics lab equipment, made possible by alumni gifts, for preparing his team to win a national autonomous vehicle design competition.

student_stories.title: History Major Preserves Community Stories
student_stories.summary: Lena used archival resources funded by donors to record oral histories from local neighborhoods, preserving stories that will be used in future coursework and exhibitions.

student_stories.title: Chemistry Scholar Pursues Cancer Research
student_stories.summary: Noah received a departmental scholarship that allowed him to reduce part-time work and dedicate more hours to lab research focused on early cancer detection.

student_stories.title: Psychology Student Expands Mental Health Outreach
student_stories.summary: With donor support, Sara helped launch a peer counseling initiative that connects more students to mental health resources on campus.

student_stories.title: Entrepreneurship Fund Backs Student Startup
student_stories.summary: Jamal used a micro-grant from the business innovation fund to prototype an app that connects students with affordable textbooks and course materials.

student_stories.title: First-Generation Scholar Finds a Path in Finance
student_stories.summary: Emily, a first-generation student, received a donor-funded scholarship that enabled her to participate in a New York finance immersion program.

student_stories.title: Case Competitions Create Real-World Impact
student_stories.summary: Diego and his team used travel support from alumni gifts to attend a national case competition, where they proposed a sustainable business model for a community clinic.

student_stories.title: Study Abroad Opens Doors in Public Policy
student_stories.summary: A need-based travel grant allowed Hana to study public policy in Geneva, where she interned with a nonprofit focused on refugee education.

student_stories.title: Language Immersion Builds Global Connections
student_stories.summary: Lukas spent a semester in Santiago through a donor-supported exchange program, dramatically improving his Spanish and cultural fluency.

student_stories.title: Wellness Fund Supports Peer Coaching
student_stories.summary: Taylor serves as a peer wellness coach, a role funded by the Student Wellness Fund, helping classmates navigate stress, sleep, and nutrition challenges.

student_stories.title: Emergency Support Bridges a Difficult Semester
student_stories.summary: After unexpected medical bills, Miguel received short-term assistance backed by wellness donations, allowing him to stay enrolled and access counseling services.

funds.name: Student Emergency Housing & Food Fund
funds.shortDescription: Rapid emergency grants for student housing and food insecurity needs.
funds.description: This fund provides fast, flexible emergency grants to students experiencing housing disruptions, food insecurity, or other critical basic needs. Gifts help cover short-term rent, security deposits, groceries, and meal support so students can remain enrolled and focused on their studies.
funds.searchableKeywords: emergency grants housing food insecurity rent groceries basic needs

funds.name: Student Emergency Textbook & Technology Fund
funds.shortDescription: Helps students cover urgent textbook, laptop, and Wi-Fi expenses.
funds.description: When unexpected textbook, laptop, or internet costs arise, this emergency fund helps students secure the materials they need to stay on track academically. Donor support ensures that technology barriers do not derail a student’s semester.
funds.searchableKeywords: emergency support textbooks laptop technology wi-fi

funds.name: First-Generation Undergraduate Scholarship Fund
funds.shortDescription: Scholarships for first-generation undergraduate students with financial need.
funds.description: This scholarship fund supports first-generation undergraduate students who demonstrate financial need and academic potential. Gifts create renewable awards that reduce reliance on loans and allow students to participate fully in campus life.

funds.name: General Undergraduate Scholarship Fund
funds.shortDescription: Flexible scholarships that support undergraduates across all majors.
funds.description: The General Undergraduate Scholarship Fund provides flexible scholarship support for students in any major. Donor gifts are pooled to create awards that help close the gap between financial aid and the full cost of attendance.

funds.name: Climate Resilience Research Fund
funds.shortDescription: Supports climate research on mitigation, adaptation, and community resilience.
funds.description: This fund advances interdisciplinary climate research focused on mitigation strategies, adaptation planning, and community resilience. Gifts provide seed funding for faculty and student projects that address rising temperatures, extreme weather, and environmental justice.

funds.name: Precision Health & Wellness Research Fund
funds.shortDescription: Drives health research on prevention, diagnostics, and wellness innovation.
funds.description: Gifts to the Precision Health & Wellness Research Fund support collaborative projects in public health, biomedical science, and data analytics. Funding helps teams develop new diagnostics, prevention strategies, and community health initiatives.
funds.searchableKeywords: health research wellness medicine public health

funds.name: Athletics Excellence Fund
funds.shortDescription: Supports all varsity teams with equipment, travel, and training resources.
funds.description: The Athletics Excellence Fund provides broad support for all varsity and club sports, funding team travel, training equipment, and enhanced academic support services for student-athletes.

funds.name: Student-Athlete Scholarship Fund
funds.shortDescription: Expands scholarship opportunities for student-athletes in all sports.
funds.description: This fund provides scholarship support for student-athletes, helping them balance academic and athletic commitments without excessive financial stress.

funds.name: University Library Enrichment Fund
funds.shortDescription: Strengthens library collections, study spaces, and digital resources.
funds.description: Gifts to the Library Enrichment Fund support new print and digital acquisitions, collaborative study spaces, technology lending, and extended hours that benefit all students and faculty.
funds.searchableKeywords: library collections study spaces digital resources

funds.name: Digital Collections & Archives Fund
funds.shortDescription: Preserves rare materials through digitization and archival projects.
funds.description: This fund accelerates the digitization of rare books, manuscripts, and archives, making them available globally while preserving fragile originals for future generations.

funds.name: Global Study Abroad Scholarship Fund
funds.shortDescription: Provides need-based scholarships for students to study abroad.
funds.description: The Global Study Abroad Scholarship Fund opens doors for students with financial need to participate in semester, summer, and short-term international programs.

funds.name: International Programs Innovation Fund
funds.shortDescription: Supports new global partnerships, exchanges, and virtual programs.
funds.description: This fund helps launch innovative international experiences, including new exchange partnerships, virtual global classrooms, and faculty-led programs.

funds.name: Department of History Fund
funds.shortDescription: Supports student research, lectures, and outreach in the History Department.
funds.description: Gifts to the Department of History Fund provide resources for student research travel, public lectures, archival acquisitions, and community-engaged projects.

funds.name: Engineering Excellence Fund
funds.shortDescription: Advances hands-on learning, labs, and student projects in Engineering.
funds.description: The Engineering Excellence Fund supports updated lab equipment, student design teams, mentorship programs, and undergraduate research across all engineering disciplines.

funds.name: Arts & Sciences Impact Fund
funds.shortDescription: Provides flexible support across the College of Arts & Sciences.
funds.description: This fund allows the dean to direct resources where they are needed most across the arts, humanities, social sciences, and natural sciences.

funds.shortDescription: Supports business student scholarships, case competitions, and internships.

funds.name: Global Studies Program Fund
funds.shortDescription: Enhances the Global Studies curriculum, advising, and experiential learning.

funds.name: Campus Impact Matching Challenge

departments.name: School of Business

departments.name: Center for Student Wellness

department_impacts.impactSummary: Four student stories from the College of Engineering highlight how donor support powers hands-on labs, robotics competitions, clean water research, and mentoring for first-generation engineers.
department_impacts.highlightQuote: “Because of donor-funded equipment and mentorship, I can test real solutions to real problems before I graduate.”

department_impacts.impactSummary: Three student profiles from the College of Arts & Sciences show how gifts fuel archival research, breakthrough chemistry labs, and student-led mental health outreach across campus.
department_impacts.highlightQuote: “Donor support turned my idea for a mental health initiative into a program that now serves hundreds of students.”

department_impacts.impactSummary: In three recent student stories, business majors describe how scholarships, startup seed funding, and case competition travel—made possible by donors—launched their careers.
department_impacts.highlightQuote: “The innovation grant from the business fund helped me turn a classroom concept into a real startup.”

department_impacts.impactSummary: Global Studies students share how donor-funded travel grants and exchanges create life-changing opportunities to study policy, language, and culture abroad.
department_impacts.highlightQuote: “My semester abroad completely reshaped how I understand global policy and my role in it.”

department_impacts.impactSummary: Student Wellness Fund stories highlight how peer coaching roles and short-term assistance help students stay enrolled, manage stress, and access timely care.
department_impacts.highlightQuote: “When I hit a crisis point, the wellness team and emergency support kept me in school.”
